tools.name: navigate_to_page
tools.description: Navigate to different sections or pages within the application

page.description: The target page or section to navigate to

tools.name: filter_products
tools.description: Filter products by category, price range, or availability status

inStock.description: Filter to show only in-stock items

tools.name: view_product_details
tools.description: Display detailed information about a specific product

productId.description: The ID of the product to view details for

tools.name: add_to_cart
tools.description: Add a product to the shopping cart with optional quantity

productId.description: The ID of the product to add to cart

tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Search for products using keywords or product names

tools.name: get_cart_info
tools.description: Display current cart contents, total value, and item count

tools.name: check_compatibility
tools.description: Verify compatibility between multiple products or validate cart contents

productIds.description: Array of product IDs to check compatibility for

tools.name: get_recommendations
tools.description: Get smart product recommendations based on a specific product or category

productId.description: Product ID to get recommendations for

tools.name: remove_from_cart
tools.description: Remove a product from the shopping cart

productId.description: The ID of the product to remove from cart

tools.name: clear_cart
tools.description: Remove all items from the shopping cart

tools.name: get_project_products
tools.description: Get products recommended for specific home improvement projects

tools.name: compare_products
tools.description: Compare specifications and features between multiple products

productIds.description: Array of product IDs to compare
